mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS demo_user ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE, status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, balance DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO demo_user (username, status, balance, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{status}, #{balance}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO demo_user (username, status, balance, created_at) VALUES
(#{user.username}, #{user.status}, #{user.balance}, #{user.createdAt})
